items.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Saturday schedule, Round of 32 standings, predictions
items.summary: Six World Cup games, knockout places on the line, Cape Verde make history and Iran wait for a place in the Round of 32.

items.title: Venezuelans dig for earthquake survivors as 72-hour rescue window nears end
items.summary: At least 920 people are confirmed dead and more than 51,000 missing after two quakes struck Venezuela on Wednesday.

items.title: Watch World Cup Day 16: Spain, Egypt, Cape Verde advance to Round of 32
items.summary: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

items.title: Thai police arrest Australian over killing of teenager found in suitcase
items.summary: Suspect was stopped at Bangkok's main airport as he allegedly tried to fly home.

items.title: Germany braces for record-breaking temperatures as heatwave moves east
items.summary: Several countries including the UK and Switzerland have posted record June temperatures, with deaths reported in France.

items.title: Somali intelligence helps US arrest alleged leader of Minnesota fraud
items.summary: US prosecutors reach into Somalia for a suspect in US fraud case.

items.title: Iran war day 120: Tehran condemns US strikes, says it violates MoU
items.summary: US says it targeted Iranian missile and drone storage locations while IRGC said it hit US military sites in the region.

items.title: Who profits from Africa’s gold?
items.summary: African governments seek greater control over gold, but much of its value continues to flow abroad.

items.title: Belgium reach World Cup knockouts as New Zealand exit tournament
items.summary: A double strike from Arsenal's Leandro Trossard against New Zealand carried Belgium to top of Group G, ahead of Egypt.

items.title: Iran and US trade blame for attacks, threatening fragile ceasefire
items.summary: Vance warned 'violence will be met with violence' while the IRGC says future responses to aggression will be 'broader'.

items.title: Which teams have qualified for the World Cup 2026 knockouts, round of 32?
items.summary: The 2026 FIFA World Cup knockout stage format, criteria and rules for qualification. Find out who's in and who's out.

items.title: Which teams are in the World Cup round of 32, and what’s the schedule?
items.summary: Cape Verde's stunning debut headlines the team list for the World Cup knockouts, which begin on Sunday in Los Angeles.

items.title: Iran wait on World Cup progress after late goal disallowed in Egypt draw
items.summary: Egypt finish second with five points in Group G, while Iran finish third with three points.

items.title: Fishermen capture the moment earthquake hits Venezuelan coast
items.summary: Fishermen have captured the moment twin earthquakes hit Venezuela’s La Guaira coastline on Wednesday.

items.title: Cape Verde becomes tiniest nation to make World Cup knockouts
items.summary: Cape Verde erupted in celebration after the national team qualified for the World Cup knockout stage and made history.

items.title: US strikes on Iran test fragile ceasefire
items.summary: The US has struck Iran for the first time since the two sides reached a Memorandum of Understanding on June 17.

items.title: Rescue efforts turn to recovery as aftershocks shake Venezuela
items.summary: Rescue workers in one Caracas neighbourhood say no help has arrived, two days after twin quakes tore through the city.

items.title: Spain beat Uruguay 1-0 to clinch World Cup Group H top spot
items.summary: Spain wins World Cup group, beating Uruguay 1-0 as Fernando Muslera’s error sends two-time champions home.

items.title: Cape Verde qualify for World Cup Round of 32, set up date with Argentina
items.summary: Cape Verde's third draw gives them a second-place finish in Group H and pits them against the world champions in the knockouts.

items.title: Newly released video exposes Henry Nowak killer’s lies
items.summary: Newly released footage has exposed the series of lies that led UK police to arrest a dying stabbing victim.

items.title: Trump justifies strikes on Iran amid ceasefire
items.summary: The US has struck Iran in retaliation for what it says was an Iranian attack on a ship in the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Iran war live: IRGC ‘targets’ US military sites in region after attacks
items.summary: The IRGC says it has 'targeted' US military in the region after Trump administration launched attacks on the country.

items.title: Paris Diamond League to go ahead with safety measures amid heatwave
items.summary: Only competitions involving professional athletes will be held, with all other activities cancelled.

items.title: US judge holds prosecutor in contempt in Charlie Kirk murder case
items.summary: Judge says comments to the media by prosecutors about defendant violate rules of what can be said outside of court.

items.title: Venezuela shaken by magnitude 4.9 tremor days after major earthquakes
items.summary: The country is still reeling from devastating pair of earthquakes that killed hundreds of people earlier this week.
